name: bookmarks
title: Bookmarks
description: Manage bookmarks, search and open links in browser
author: webpro

commands.name: open-bookmark
commands.title: Open Bookmark
commands.subtitle: Open url in browser
commands.description: Search bookmarks and open url in a new browser tab

preferences.name: reuseTab
preferences.title: Browser
preferences.label: Reuse existing browser tab
preferences.description: Focus an existing tab if the URL is already open, instead of opening a new tab

commands.name: add-bookmark
commands.title: Add Bookmark
commands.description: Add a new bookmark to a folder

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
